title: Treat Plaza — Into The Streets SF
content: # Treat Plaza. ## Shared Spaces Mini Grant Applications Are Closed. #### THANK YOU FOR YOUR INTEREST IN THE TREAT PLAZA SHARED SPACES STEWARDSHIP & ACTIVATION MINI GRANT PROGRAM. Applications for this mini grant program are now closed. Watch this space for updates about grantee-led activities coming to Treat Plaza! #### ABOUT THE SHARED SPACES STEWARDSHIP & ACTIVATION MINI GRANT PROGRAM. Into The Streets is excited to offer *The Shared Spaces Stewardship & Activation Mini Grant Program* for Treat Plaza in partnership with SF Public Works, the SF Planning Department and the Office of Economic and Workforce Development  to support community-driven programming and stewardship projects at and around Treat Plaza through June 2024. Applicants are encouraged to be creative in bringing ideas for public stewardship and programming to the space. * All activities must be free and open to the public. * The location of the activity must include Treat Plaza.

title: Exploratorium: After Dark Thursdays · Reviews
content: All Experiences in San Francisco. # Exploratorium: After Dark Thursdays · Reviews. Tons of things to do. I felt like a kid again :). 4 hours is barely enough to explore the whole exhibit. Will have to come back. I bought the tickets for my daughters. They had a nice time. Top night, a pleasant surprise as had no idea what to expect. We booked it as an idea of what to do for a night when we were in town. If you do something once, the evening flew by and was fun as well as interesting. Don't miss this experience! Don't have the app yet? Search or ﬁlter to ﬁnd nearby experiences and upcoming events catered to you.

title: the Google Visitor Experience
content: Welcome to the Google Visitor Experience. The Google Visitor Experience is a new destination for everyone — neighbors, visitors, and Googlers — at our Gradient Canopy office in Mountain View. Connect with friends at the cafe, attend a community event at the Huddle, explore our hardware products and services at the Google Store, support local businesses at the Pop-Up Shop, and enjoy art and events on the plaza. Learn where the Huddle, Cafe @ Mountain View, Pop-Up Shop, Google Store, and art are located at the Google Visitor Experience. Experience a taste of Google through food and beverages made with local, seasonal ingredients ### Google Store. Shop the latest products made by Google, get help from one of our experienced experts, attend a workshop, and find exclusive Google merchandise ### Art. Become inspired by interactive and imaginative artworks. Shop the latest products made by Google, get help from one of our experienced experts, attend a workshop, and find exclusive Google merchandise ### Pop-Up Shop.
